creator: odhiambo@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to ari from comment #15)

My sogod startup problem is resolved.

The problem was caused by the presence of stale libraries (*.so.4.9) in /usr/local/lib/compat/pkg/. Similar libraries (new ones) also existed in /usr/local/GNUstep/Local/Library/Libraries/

Now my only question is how this happened, but all is fine ;)

I also agree the PR can be closed now.
